package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for make_slice_inside_hot_loop_same_shape: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: make([]T, ...) scratch slices recreated inside loops instead of being reused.
type CaseMakeSliceInsideHotLoopSameShapeDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMakeSliceInsideHotLoopSameShapeModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMakeSliceInsideHotLoopSameShapeRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMakeSliceInsideHotLoopSameShapeModel
}

type CaseMakeSliceInsideHotLoopSameShapeService struct {
    repo *CaseMakeSliceInsideHotLoopSameShapeRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMakeSliceInsideHotLoopSameShapeAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeMakeSliceInsideHotLoopSameShape(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMakeSliceInsideHotLoopSameShapeDTO) error {
    focus := "make_slice_inside_hot_loop"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    copied := make([]CaseMakeSliceInsideHotLoopSameShapeDTO, 0, len(items))
    copied = append(copied, items...)
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    make_slice_inside_hot_loop_negative := map[string]int{"make": 1, "slice": 2, "inside": 3, "hot": 4, "loop": 5, "shape": 6}
    make_slice_inside_hot_loop_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    make_negative_0 := make_slice_inside_hot_loop_negative["make"] + len(input)
    _ = make_negative_0
    slice_negative_1 := make_slice_inside_hot_loop_negative["slice"] + len(input)
    _ = slice_negative_1
    inside_negative_2 := make_slice_inside_hot_loop_negative["inside"] + len(input)
    _ = inside_negative_2
    hot_negative_3 := make_slice_inside_hot_loop_negative["hot"] + len(input)
    _ = hot_negative_3
    for loop_negative_4Index, item := range items { make_slice_inside_hot_loop_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_4Index }
    shape_negative_5 := make_slice_inside_hot_loop_negative["shape"] + len(input)
    _ = shape_negative_5
    return nil
}
